title: Promotions & discounts
description: Create intentional discounts with clear schedules and redemption safeguards.

error.loadDescription: The promotions list is temporarily unavailable. Refresh and try again.

table.emptyMessage: Create a code for your next campaign. Redemption limits and schedules keep discounts intentional.
table.filteredEmptyMessage: No promotions match the current search or filters.

create.basicsDesc: Code, status, and whether shoppers must enter the code at checkout.
create.codeDesc: Use letters and numbers without spaces. Shoppers enter this unless automatic apply is on.
create.autoDesc: Eligible carts get the discount without entering a code.
create.taxDesc: When off, the discount is calculated on the cart before tax.
create.maxQtyDesc: Limit how many units of each matching item can be discounted.
create.allocDesc: Each applies the full discount per item; across splits it.
create.buyGetDesc: Set how many items unlock the offer, and how many free items shoppers receive.
create.prodTitleCount: Products that count toward the offer
create.prodDescCommon: Leave empty to apply more broadly once other conditions are added later.
create.prodDescBuyGet: For Buy X get Y, select at least the products that unlock free items.
create.freeProdDesc: Defaults to the same products as above if left empty.
create.schedDesc: Optional start and end times for when this offer is available.
create.campNameDesc: A friendly name for reporting. Defaults to the promotion code.
create.budgetDesc: Cap how often the campaign can be used, or how much total discount it can give.
create.toastError: Could not create promotion. Try again.
